checks.title: FSOT self-referral on FULL domain atlas

evidence.mind_answer_preview: FSOT LAW (ToE paradigm shift, free_parameters=0, authority D1D38A): raw_S = K·(T1+T2+T3) from fixed seeds (π, e, φ, γ, Catalan). T1 carries coherence / perceived_adjust / quirk_mod (observer coupling); T2 carries dimensional / fluid-structure terms; T3 carries acoustic_bleed, poof, chaos, and long-range bleed. Each scientific domain is a *fold* of one 25D fluid condensate, indexed by effective depth D_eff and phase δψ — not a separate fitted model. Sign(S)>0 = emergence (structure-forming vitality); sign(S)≤0 = dispersal. This is a paradigm shift in how the universe is seen: one fluid, many folds, life and cosmos on the same seed engine — not bolted-on ontologies. Formal multi-prover obligations + large empirical panels already close many domains on this same engine; multipath Monte Carlo
evidence.note: Self-referral uses full core atlas + multi-cluster literature — not 6 keywords.

checks.finding: Self-referral FULL: multipath 35/35 cores, lit hits=24 domains=17, mind domain-ground 94%, structural 100%, clusters 100%.
checks.improvement: Mind must emit full 35-core S panel on self-audit; auto-merge literature hits per core; LTM-solidify audit ledger; never equate multipath map% with green-gate.

checks.title: Formal soft-court bridge
checks.finding: Soft court local=True, proved_claims=65, pending=25, promoted=8.
checks.improvement: Auto-promote audit high_failures into pending obligations; never claim per-path Lean.
